runtime.notes: Root scripts own backend/frontend/switchboard startup; backend stays on `127.0.0.1:8516`, frontend binds on `0.0.0.0:8517`, and the Switchboard node stays local on `127.0.0.1:8710`. Logs live in `logs/backend.log`, `logs/frontend.log`, `logs/switchboard.log`, `logs/start.log`, `logs/token_usage_summary.json`, and `logs/token_usage.jsonl`; pid files live in `runtime/backend.pid`, `runtime/frontend.pid`, and `runtime/switchboard.pid`.
